name: boundary-aware-agent

refers_to_models.name: Claude Fable 5
refers_to_models.notes: Mythos-class public version. Adds capability classifier that routes sensitive requests to Opus 4.8.

refers_to_models.name: Claude Mythos 5
refers_to_models.notes: Available only to Glasswing partners and approved researchers.

purpose: Externalize the Fable-5/Opus-style capability boundary into reusable artifacts (Blindspot Pass, Boundary Card, Model Capability Profile) so other models — MiniMax, Codex, open-source, mid-tier — benefit too.
scope_articles: Boundary card for current task (model fit, context fit, tool fit, risk)
Model capability profile (per-model strengths and gates)
out_of_scope: Modifying the chosen model's weights or system prompt
Self-approval of permission, safety or routing changes
Bypassing the Loom runtime gates defined in agentteam-runtime skill
consumes: agentteam-runtime skill (for run context, gate policy, handoff envelope)

verification.phase0_done: All templates render in YAML; prompt pack verified against 3 sample inputs each
verification.phase1_done: Blindspot Pass runs as part of loom run preflight; refusal rules fire on violation
verification.phase2_done: Improvement loop emits candidates for 5 failure patterns; eval patch generator ships 1 regression test per candidate
verification.phase3_done: Canary promotion flow and rollback work; none of the 4 prohibited patch types ever auto-promote

naming_note: Original draft called this layer 'CBAL' (Capability Boundary Awareness Layer). Renamed to drop the 'Layer' suffix and to avoid namespace overlap with 'CBF' (Control Barrier Functions) used in the companion control-theory doc.
